title: WalletStore::new silently opens DB from newer schema — no downgrade guard
description: WalletStore::new applies migrations with if version < N. A DB from future schema v9+ opened by current code (max v8) silently proceeds: all migration blocks are skipped, code queries columns that do not exist or ignores new ones, no error is raised. Rolling back software after a schema-bumping release becomes silently unsafe. Fix: after all migrations, check if version > CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION and return an explicit error.
